title: cheilanthes jonesii
intro: Cheilanthes jonesii, also known as Jones' cloak fern, is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. It is native to New Zealand and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antibacterial agent. Herbal preparations of Cheilanthes jonesii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
